columns.name: STVMAJR_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the major code referenced in the Catalog, Class Sched., Recruit., Admissions, Gen. Student, Registr., and Acad. Hist. Modules. Reqd. value: 00 - Major Not Declared.

columns.name: STVMAJR_DESC
columns.description: This field specifies the major area of study associated with the major code.

columns.name: STVMAJR_CIPC_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the Classification of Institutional Programs (CIP) code associated with the major area of study.

columns.name: STVMAJR_VALID_MAJOR_IND
columns.description: This field indicates whether the area of study is a valid major.

columns.name: STVMAJR_VALID_MINOR_IND
columns.description: This field indicates whether the area of study is a valid minor.

columns.name: STVMAJR_VALID_CONCENTRATN_IND
columns.description: This field indicates whether the area of study is a valid concentration.

columns.name: STVMAJR_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the most recent date a record was created or updated.

columns.name: STVMAJR_OCCUPATION_IND
columns.description: Occupation specific indicator. Y indicates program has been designated as occupation specific

columns.name: STVMAJR_AID_ELIGIBILITY_IND
columns.description: A indicator which indicates the eligibility for aid

columns.name: STVMAJR_SYSTEM_REQ_IND
columns.description: System Required Indicator

columns.name: STVMAJR_VR_MSG_NO
columns.description: The Voice Response message number assigned to the recorded message that describes the major code.

columns.name: STVMAJR_DISP_WEB_IND
columns.description: Display on Web Indicator is now obsolete.

columns.name: STVMAJR_SEVIS_EQUIV
columns.description: SEVIS EQUIVALENCY: SEVIS code for primary major

columns.name: STVMAJR_SURROGATE_ID
columns.description: SURROGATE ID: Immutable unique key

columns.name: STVMAJR_VERSION
columns.description: VERSION: Optimistic lock token.

columns.name: STVMAJR_USER_ID
columns.description: USER ID: The user ID of the person who inserted or last updated this record.

columns.name: STVMAJR_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: DATA ORIGIN: Source system that created or updated the data.

columns.name: STVMAJR_VPDI_CODE
columns.description: VPDI CODE: Multi-entity processing code.

columns.name: STVMAJR_MAJOR_DESC
columns.description: MAJOR DESC: The MAJOR description.

columns.name: STVMAJR_MINOR_DESC
columns.description: MINOR DESC: The MINOR description.

columns.name: STVMAJR_CONCENTRATION_DESC
columns.description: CONCENTRATION DESC: The CONCENTRATION description.

columns.name: STVMAJR_TOPS_CODE
columns.description: Taxonomy of Program Code: Validated by STVTOPS_CODE field and define with same format, VARCHAR2(6).
